gradient_shell.prototype: min-h-screen radial+linear soft gradient (blue-tinted dbeafe/e0f2fe → f8fafc/eef2f7)
gradient_shell.implementation: body.backgroundImage: radial-gradient(1200px 600px at 15% -10%, rgb(219,234,254) 0%, transparent 60%), radial-gradient(900px 500px at 110% 110%, rgb(224,242,254) 0%, transparent 55%), linear-gradient(rgb(248,250,252) 0%, rgb(238,242,247) 100%)
gradient_shell.notes: Exact gradient values match prototype spec

brand_lockup.implementation: div.h-9.w-9 with M (computed 36x36px), MonoPilot text with Mono bold + Pilot medium

card_container.prototype: centered card max-w-[480px], rounded-xl, white bg, shadow, 36px padding

title_subtitle.prototype: 'Welcome back' (h1 22px bold), 'Sign in to your MES workspace' (13px slate-500)
title_subtitle.implementation: heading 'Welcome back' level=1, paragraph 'Sign in to your MES workspace'

email_field.prototype: label 'Work email', input type=email, placeholder 'you@company.com', autoFocus
email_field.implementation: textbox 'Work email' [active] (autoFocus), placeholder='you@company.com', computed height=40px, radius=6px

remember_forgot_row.prototype: checkbox 'Remember me for 30 days' (checked default), 'Forgot password?' link right-aligned
remember_forgot_row.implementation: checkbox 'Remember me for 30 days' [checked], link 'Forgot password?' → /en/login/forgot-password

sso_section.prototype: 'OR' divider, button 'SSO sign-in coming soon' disabled
sso_section.implementation: generic 'or' divider, button 'SSO sign-in coming soon' [disabled]

admin_link.prototype: 'Do not have an account? Contact your admin' mailto link

footer.prototype: contentinfo: '© 2026 MonoPilot MES · Privacy · Terms · Status · v3.1.0'
footer.implementation: contentinfo with exact same text and links

css_utilities.prototype: body font Inter (not Times), card 480px, border-radius 12px, inputs 40px / 6px radius
css_utilities.implementation: bodyFontFamily='Inter, Arial, Segoe UI, system-ui', cardWidth=480, cardBorderRadius=12px, inputHeight=40, inputBorderRadius=6px

deviations.prototype: "Don't have an account? Contact your admin"
deviations.implementation: "Do not have an account? Contact your admin"
deviations.reason: Apostrophe-free variant avoids HTML entity handling in JSX; semantic meaning identical
